title: Evaluate functions
description: Evaluate functions for specific inputs given the formula of the function.  Functions are written using function notation.

hints:
To find the value of $f(\blueD{5})$, we need to substitute $\blueD{x}=\blueD{5}$ into the function's formula:

$\begin{align}f(\blueD{x})&=5\blueD{x}-3\\\\
f(\blueD{5})&=5\cdot\blueD{5}-3\\\\
&=25-3\\\\
&=22\end{align}$

In conclusion,

$f(5)=22$

To find the value of $g(\blueD{4})$, we need to substitute $\blueD{r}=\blueD{4}$ into the function's formula:

$\begin{align}g(\blueD{r})&=25-3\blueD{r}\\\\
g(\blueD{4})&=25-3\cdot\blueD{4}\\\\
&=25-12\\\\
&=13\end{align}$

In conclusion,

$g(4)=13$

To find the value of $h(\blueD{35})$, we need to substitute $\blueD{t}=\blueD{35}$ into the function's formula:

$\begin{align}h(\blueD{t})&=50-\dfrac{\blueD{t}}{5}\\\\
h(\blueD{35})&=50-\dfrac{\blueD{35}}{5}\\\\
&=50-7\\\\
&=43\end{align}$

In conclusion,

$h(35)=43$

To find the value of $k(\blueD{-5})$, we need to substitute $\blueD{x}=\blueD{-5}$ into the function's formula:

$\begin{align}k(\blueD{x})&=6\blueD{x}+100\\\\
k(\blueD{-5})&=6\cdot(\blueD{-5})+100\\\\
&=-30+100\\\\
&=70\end{align}$

In conclusion,

$k(-5)=70$

To find the value of $f(\blueD{7})$, we need to substitute $\blueD{t}=\blueD{7}$ into the function's formula:

$\begin{align}f(\blueD{t})&=2\blueD{t}-3\\\\
f(\blueD{7})&=2\cdot\blueD{7}-3\\\\
&=14-3\\\\
&=11\end{align}$

In conclusion,

$f(7)=11$

To find the value of $g(\blueD{3})$, we need to substitute $\blueD{r}=\blueD{3}$ into the function's formula:

$\begin{align}g(\blueD{r})&=-5\blueD{r}+13\\\\
g(\blueD{3})&=-5\cdot\blueD{3}+13\\\\
&=-15+13\\\\
&=-2\end{align}$

In conclusion,

$g(3)=-2$

To find the value of $h(\blueD{-18})$, we need to substitute $\blueD{x}=\blueD{-18}$ into the function's formula:

$\begin{align}h(\blueD{x})&=17+\dfrac{\blueD{x}}{6}\\\\
h(\blueD{-18})&=17+\dfrac{\blueD{-18}}{6}\\\\
&=17-3\\\\
&=14\end{align}$

In conclusion,

$h(-18)=14$

To find the value of $k(\blueD{3})$, we need to substitute $\blueD{t}=\blueD{3}$ into the function's formula:

$\begin{align}k(\blueD{t})&=13\blueD{t}-2\\\\
k(\blueD{3})&=13\cdot\blueD{3}-2\\\\
&=39-2\\\\
&=37\end{align}$

In conclusion,

$k(3)=37$

To find the value of $k(\blueD{-7})$, we need to substitute $\blueD{t}=\blueD{-7}$ into the function's formula:

$\begin{align}k(\blueD{t})&=10\blueD{t}-19\\\\
k(\blueD{-7})&=10\cdot(\blueD{-7})-19\\\\
&=-70-19\\\\
&=-89\end{align}$

In conclusion,

$k(-7)=-89$

To find the value of $f(\blueD{30})$, we need to substitute $\blueD{x}=\blueD{30}$ into the function's formula:

$\begin{align}f(\blueD{x})&=14-0.5\blueD{x}\\\\
f(\blueD{30})&=14-0.5\cdot\blueD{30}\\\\
&=14-15\\\\
&=-1\end{align}$

In conclusion,

$f(30)=-1$

To find the value of $g(\blueD{6})$, we need to substitute $\blueD{r}=\blueD{6}$ into the function's formula:

$\begin{align}g(\blueD{r})&=-1-7\blueD{r}\\\\
g(\blueD{6})&=-1-7\cdot\blueD{6}\\\\
&=-1-42\\\\
&=-43\end{align}$

In conclusion,

$g(6)=-43$

To find the value of $h(\blueD{11})$, we need to substitute $\blueD{t}=\blueD{11}$ into the function's formula:

$\begin{align}h(\blueD{t})&=-20+11\blueD{t}\\\\
h(\blueD{11})&=-20+11\cdot\blueD{11}\\\\
&=-20+121\\\\
&=101\end{align}$

In conclusion,

$h(11)=101$
